Operation 'createAuthToken' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, unclear_purpose, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary 'User login' is vague and doesn't indicate token generation. Description is completely missing. Added clarity about OAuth authentication flow, expected inputs (credentials), response structure (TokenResponse), and how the token should be used in subsequent requests. This helps AI agents understand when to call this operation and how to use the returned token.

data.summary_suggestion: Authenticate user and generate OAuth token
data.description_suggestion: Authenticates a user with provided credentials and returns an OAuth access token for subsequent API requests. Accepts username/password or client credentials in the request body. Returns a TokenResponse object containing the access token, token type, expiration time, and other authentication metadata. This token must be included in the Authorization header for authenticated API calls.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'User login' is vague and doesn't indicate token generation. Description is completely missing. Added clarity about OAuth authentication flow, expected inputs (credentials), response structure (TokenResponse), and how the token should be used in subsequent requests. This helps AI agents understand when to call this operation and how to use the returned token.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve newly created customers for Zapier
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of newly created customers from the system for Zapier integration. Returns a ZapierCustoserListDto object containing customer records with their details. This endpoint is specifically designed for Zapier automation workflows to trigger actions based on new customer creation. Requires Bearer token authentication.
